feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: RSDSO_ROLLBACK153 Deletion of overlapping requests not supported for DSO (advanced)
entry.content:
We created a step in the process chain, and it was working fine, but after some time, we started getting the error: Deletion of overlapping requests is not supported for DSO.

 
 
 
how to solve this error

entry.title: BW on HANA service pack upgrade impact - High importance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to upgrade the BW system for 7.5 SPS 6 to SPS 30 or 31. Will there be any impact on existing BW and HANA models?

And we do have current BPC plugin as below version. Will it support or any impact when we upgrade the BW?

SAP BUSINESS PLANNING AND CONS  800  SPS 15 (10/14)  sap.com  SBOP PC 10.0 FOR SAP NW

 

Thanks,

Prabhakar

entry.title: SAP HANA Service pack upgrade - High importance
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to upgrade  HANA 2.0 SP 5 to 2.0 SPS 7 or higher or SPS 8. Will there be any Impact on existing BW and HANA models?

 

Thanks,

Prabhakar

entry.title: Hana studio / query : Filter by attribute of IO in structure
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create the new structure for the query.

In this structure , I would like to have a filter by attribute.

For IO "0WBS_ELEMT",for line X,  I would like to make a filter with value 2001 for attribut 0COMP_CODE.

But, I can't add the attribute '0COMP_CODE' because the bottom 'Add' is not active and i can restrict by attribut (see the screenshoot)

Question : how to manage the filter with attribut of IO in query structure

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: Hana studio : filter attribut in structure
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create the new structure for the query.

In this structure , I would like to have a filter by attribute.

For IO "0WBS_ELEMT",for line X,  I would like to make a filter with value 2001 for attribut 0COMP_CODE.

But, I can't add the attribute '0COMP_CODE' because the bottom 'Add' is not active and i can restrict by attribut 

Question : how to manage the filter with attribut of IO in query structure

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: Too many 0FISPCER entries in the Query FISCPER S4 Lookup
entry.content:
Hi,

BW Gurus:  Anybody has got a good solution ?

Finall Solution In Short: Delete in ob29 or SPRO the Fiscalperiod with too many entries ( if FI does not need it...)

The Problem:
SAP_BW              758         0001      SAPK-75801INSAPBW   SAP Business Warehouse

Too many Query Paramater 0FISCPER:

 

This data originates from the  0FISCPER3 SID Table /BI0/SFISCPER3:

The 0FSICPER3 masterdata table /BI0/PFISCPER3 is fine:

Solution approaches and investigations which DO NOT WORK OUT:

This is not due to 0FSICPER3 is using local implementation class CL_RSMD_RS_0FISCPER3:

Reinstall the 0FSICVPER from the RSA1 / Business Content wont help.

Rebuild the data with RSRHIERARCHYVIRT, wont help:

RSDMDD_DELETE_BATCH won’t work because it’s the SID table.

Hard delete the obsolete in the SID Table /BI0/SFISCPER3
DELETE FROM /BI0/SFISCPER3 where CHCKFL <> ‘X’ and FISCPER3 = '365'.
Dont do this You cant edit the Masterdata ADT afterwords even If You do an update with the
same thing again.

SAP OSS Recommendations are:
https://me.sap.com/notes/801313/D - 801313 - Questions about queries based on virtual InfoCubes:
Fits only for physical: Cubes

https://me.sap.com/notes/801313/E 801313 - Questions about queries based on virtual InfoCubesNice summaray on the modes of a Infobject, Provider, Queery, but did not do

https://me.sap.com/notes/1565809/E  -1565809 - BW Query Input(F4) Help: Settings and Properties
not if You have Composite Providerrs: the annotation could do it : "...in certain cases "
Change the table rsadmin to changeable in SE11.
Enter bei RSADMIN manually RSMD_READ_MODE_D_FOR_VIEWS  X
This one worked oút
Mind: the setting is centrally for all and any querry on You box !

Coal Pit of 1565809 - BW Query Input(F4) Help: Settings and Properties
TheAfO Query FSICPER  F4  lookup gets fff slow.

Finally we tracked it down to the setup of the Fiscal Period:
OB29 or SPRO

We deleted the entry FISCPER = DL with 365 Days (after checking with the FI guys if its needed at all) and got only 52 remaining.
We deleted the entry FISCPER = WK  with 53 and FISCPER = WK  24 Days (after checking with the FI guys if its needed at all) and got only 12 remaining.

...but 0FISCPER3 SID Table /BI0/SFISCPER3 did not change convicingly: (compare above):

Alternative:
Base the 0FSICPER3 on a HANA Calculation View and Calculation View with  the DE / EN Texts
with static 12 lines ( ...union ....)

Done. However.

Best Martin

entry.title: Portal Runtime Error.
entry.content:
Hello everyone, My users are having this problem after the last bw update.

Portal runtime error

Exception while processing the request; send the exception ID to the portal administrator

Exception ID 07:49_15/01/25_0096_23493150

More details about this exception can be found in the log file.

Someone can give some advice how to fix or how to find this log exception file in SAP BW?

Users that have the the sap user different from the user windows network the portal ask for login and password they can login.

But users that have the user sap the same from windows network the portal return this error. I really hope someone can help me.

 

Thank you very much.

entry.title: SAP BW Query - You do not have the authorization for the selected component
entry.content:
Hello SAP BW Security Experts,

we have implemented a new query on a new DSO object.
Working all fine for admin users but for business users with restricted authorization the bellow error is displayed.

First I thought access to infoarea is the problem so added to respective profile the approriated infoarea. But even if I give * for infoarea in the profile error message remains.

What is really confusing (for me) is that su53  / st01  displayes BIAUTH  0BIALL missing.

Although there is no authorization relevant infoobject in the DSO at all (check bellow with admin user rsecadmin).

Any ideas what is wrong?

Thanks and best regards
Axel

entry.title: Which CDSview can provide the deprecated 0PM_MEASUREMENT Datasource?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please I would like to know if there is a cdsview to replace an obsolete data source 0PM_MEASUREME,

Which contains fields like measuring point, measuring document, internal char number, Equipment Number... and other fields from 0PM_MEASUREMENT

Regards.

entry.title: can u share your resolution on the error
how to identify which planning function uses certain variable?
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

i want to know the planning function technical name that uses a certain variable.

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/link-between-rszeltdir-and-rsrrepdir/qaq-p/12501099

In the link above, I can found how to identify the technical name of the query using a variable ID, but it is difficult to find the planning function in this way.

For example, I want to find out which copy function or distribution by reference function use a certain variable.

 

Thanks

entry.title: IW38 change main work centers mass change
entry.content: Is it possible to change all the main work centers to an diffrent main work center with an mass change? Please let me know.

entry.title: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but there is data to be processed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a data flow from one standard ADSO to another standard ADSO via an InfoSource. Both transformations have SQLScript Expert Routines. I went ahead and created a full DTP with a filter on 0CALMONTH. When I run the DTP, no data is retrieved nor processed. If I run the full DTP without a filter, the load runs fine. I'm sure the source has data for the selection because I'm able to see records for the same filter selection in the HANA Database Explorer. If I create an intermediate ADSO to "stage" the data inbetween, both transformations routines run fine and are able to load data to and from the intermediate ADSO. Any ideas what might be causing the issue with the InfoSource flow?

 

EDIT: I added a screenshot of the DTP Monitor

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform.  I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

          TRY.
              IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
                RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
*                  MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
                exporting
                  msgid           = 'BRAIN'
                  msgno           = '642'
                  msgty           = sy-msgty
                  attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
              ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
            CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
              MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
          ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv

entry.title: remove space at end of the target field MAT_PLANT in sap bw transformation level
entry.content:
i have been getting space in MAT_PLANT field at end of the name it has different type of naming conventions like '0000000334455' and fiew with text model like  E2S5T10, VALLWH... etc like wise however actual flow is DS-->DSO1-->DSO2-->MP  DS to DSO1 There is a function module to remove space and add '.' dot . but bringing the records  to DSO1 ex:

record 1 has  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

then after transformation it bringing like

record 1  'VALLWH' and plant 5000 and

record 2 'VALLWH  '  plant 5001

record 3 'VALLWH.'  plant 5001

i tried all the possible ways to  remove trailing and leading space with field routine and formula between DSO1 to DSO2  like REPLACE ...RTRIM,CONDESE, SHIFT LEFT ect but couldnt find the solution i am not sure What is the cause and why am not able to removing it please experts help me on this at Target field MAT_PLANT

entry.title: HOW TO ADD NEW FIELD IN EXISTED CUBE AT TRANSFORMATION LEVEL AND FILL WITH LOOK UP DSO
entry.content:
Hi experts 

please help me on this ,

i have new development requirement. there is an existed flow as DS --DSO1-DSO2-INFOCUBE in sap bw i have to add new field to INFOCUBE directly (no mapping in transoformation level)and which should get data from some other dso say DSO3 with lookup method(ex say: 0DOC_DATE ) using matching key fields and apply and move these changes to development to quality please explain me the step by step approach with example if possible

Thanks in Advance..

entry.title: PC failed recovery steps
entry.content:
Hi experts ,

i have been facing the DSO Failed in process chain with space issue . while checking its getting data from another DSO, AS shown in below flow from that same source dso its loading to another two flows , among those one flow completed till cube level, another OHD is loading ,now how can i recover the below failed (RED). Explain me or please provide me the relevant source to recovery this scenario.

Thanks in advance,

VIJAY

entry.title: Datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a S4/HANA system
entry.content:
Hello,

we have used the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a release with product EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0. This datasource is related to table T25A0.

Now we have a S4/HANA system (product version SAP S/4HANA 2023). The table T25A0 is still there, but we miss the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in the BI content.

Any idea?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: BW4HANA Goods Movement from Inventory Management (2LIS_03_BF) load without Stock initialization da
entry.content: I want to transfer all historical material movements from corporite adso to inventory adso, I don't need initial stock, all movements are already in corporite dso, should the dtp extraction mod Full and dtp setting Historical Transactions in the first transfer? Or would it be enough to run it directly without the DTP setting as Historical Transactions?

entry.title: How to display custom Message in RSRT and AO until valid input is given
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have implemented BADI for customer exit variables - calling external program to implement form - endform. I need to display a Message in RSRT and AO [Analysis for Office] until valid currency type value is given as input. It should allow to enter correct currency type value if wrong input is provided

In the called external called program in Form - endform - under i_step =3 , i have implemented the following code to display message. But I need to display my own custom message.

TRY.
IF lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE cx_rs_error_with_message
* MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '655' WITH 'Enter Currency Type --> 30 '.
exporting
msgid = 'BRAIN'
msgno = '642'
msgty = sy-msgty
attribute_msgv1 = 'Currency Type.'.
ENDIF. " lv_return_msg IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_rs_error_with_message.
MESSAGE ID 'BRAIN' TYPE 'W' NUMBER '642' WITH ' Currency Type.'.
ENDTRY.

Please suggest me , is there any class available to display message (in both RSRT and AO) until valid currency type value is provided.

Thanks
kv
